# Model Relationships — Models Generated by Reliese Package

## Entity Map

```
User
 ├── projects()          → hasMany Project       (owner_email → email)
 ├── project_members()   → hasMany ProjectMember  (user_email  → email)
 ├── task_assignees()    → hasMany TaskAssignee   (user_email  → email)
 └── comments()         → hasMany Comment        (user_email  → email)

Project
 ├── owner()            → belongsTo User         (owner_email → email)
 ├── members()          → hasMany ProjectMember  (project_id)
 ├── pools()            → hasMany Pool           (project_id, ordered by position)
 └── tags()             → hasMany Tag            (project_id)

ProjectMember
 ├── project()          → belongsTo Project      (project_id)
 └── user()             → belongsTo User         (user_email → email)

Pool
 ├── project()          → belongsTo Project      (project_id)
 └── tasks()            → hasMany Task           (pool_id, ordered by position)

Task
 ├── pool()             → belongsTo Pool         (pool_id)
 ├── comments()         → hasMany Comment        (task_id)
 ├── task_assignees()   → hasMany TaskAssignee   (task_id)
 └── tags()             → belongsToMany Tag      (pivot: task_tags)

Comment
 ├── task()             → belongsTo Task         (task_id)
 └── user()             → belongsTo User         (user_email → email)

TaskAssignee
 ├── task()             → belongsTo Task         (task_id)
 └── user()             → belongsTo User         (user_email → email)

Tag
 └── project()          → belongsTo Project      (project_id)

TaskTag  (pivot table — rarely queried directly)
 ├── task()             → belongsTo Task
 └── tag()              → belongsTo Tag
```



## Common Query Patterns

### Load with eager-loaded relations
```php
// Projects + members + each member's user profile
Project::with('members.user')->get();

// Full project tree (pools > tasks > assignees)
Project::with('pools.tasks.task_assignees.user')->get();

// Task with comments and tags
Task::with('comments.user', 'tags')->find($id);
```

### Filter with whereHas
```php
// Projects the current user belongs to (any role)
Project::whereHas('members', fn($q) =>
    $q->where('user_email', Auth::user()->email)
)->get();

// Tasks assigned to the current user
Task::whereHas('task_assignees', fn($q) =>
    $q->where('user_email', Auth::user()->email)
)->get();
```

### Count without loading
```php
Project::withCount('members')->get();
// Access: $project->members_count

Task::withCount('comments')->get();
// Access: $task->comments_count
```

### Combined (most common)
```php
Project::whereHas('members', fn($q) =>
        $q->where('user_email', Auth::user()->email)
    )
    ->with('members.user')
    ->withCount('members')
    ->get();
```
